title: RION Encoding
summary: The RION Encoding tutorial has been updated to be more clear, and to also contain encoding examples in hexadecimal notation, so you can now see exactly what RION encoded data looks like.
content: The RION Encoding tutorial has been updated to be more clear, and to also contain encoding examples in hexadecimal notation, so you can now see exactly what RION encoded data looks like.
